name: smart-code-reviewer
description: Deterministic code drift detection for AI-generated code. Catches duplication, spec drift, and guideline violations before they reach the repo.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic drift detection for AI-generated code — duplication, spec drift, and guideline violations caught before commit.
interface.longDescription: Smart Code Reviewer embeds deterministic checks inside the AI generation loop. Run /smart-review after generating code to detect duplicate blocks (Jaccard + TF-IDF cosine similarity), semgrep rule violations, and output from any external checker (eslint, tsc, etc.). Findings include the file, line, description, and a cross-reference to the related code so the agent can self-correct before committing. Installs natively via Codex; no companion install step required.
